fsm.how:
[4,]{id,content}:
  how.command-paths,scripts/hapax-methodology-dispatch scripts/cc-claim scripts/cc-close scripts/cc-stage-advance
  how.scoped-source-mutation,"Claim the exact task, mutate only declared mutation_scope_refs, run declared quality gates, and append evidence without rewriting history."
  how.relay-and-receipt,"Report the current position and evidence through the existing relay and receipt ledger; retain exact task, route, canon, and claim identifiers."
  how.blocked-repair,"Record blocked_reason, blocked_witness, and relay_receipt; resume only through a valid operator escape to S6 or S0."
fsm.must:
[37,]{id,content}:
  must.coordinator-engagement,"The single coordinating session MUST dispatch appropriate slices and MAY do support mutations, but must NEVER operate outside the SDLC + capability surface."
  must.raw-prose-gate,"Operator prose, relay notes, dashboards, terminal paste, and session memory are intake, not implementation authority."
  must.scope-mask-before-objective,NEVER unions and ONLY intersects across scope; malformed or missing constraints fail-closed before routing objective evaluation.
  must.authorization-absence,An absent *_authorized flag means not authorized.
  must.binding-vocabulary,cc-task AuthorityCase mutation_scope_refs route_id NEVER ONLY fail-closed governed-override-not-bypass
  must.grounding.authorization-vocabulary,axiom_mutation_authorized decision_minting_authorized docs_mutation_authorized implementation_authorized provider_spend_authorized public_current release_authorized runtime_mutation_authorized source_mutation_authorized vault_mutation_authorized
  must.grounding.gate-verdict-vocabulary,pass refuse BLOCKED
  must.grounding.atomic-position-vocabulary,task_id stage_token legal_successors authority_case authorized_flags mutation_scope_refs claim_identity route_decision canon_hash canon_version canon_level effective_constraint_digest impingement_hash portal_set receipt_lineage
  must.gate-is-authority,"The canon informs and the external gate enforces; injected prose never substitutes for claim, scope, route, mutation, transition, or close admission."
  must.no-silent-downgrade,"Missing, stale, malformed, mismatched, or below-floor context refuses the action with a typed repair path; it never becomes an empty or unconstrained default."
  must.atomic-position-chain,"Task, claim, relay, receipt, FSM position, canon, and impingement hashes must describe one current position before a protected action can proceed."
  must.escape-grant,"EscapeGrant is explicit, receipted, reversible, and cannot suppress the position, canon, or impingement record."
  must.transition-reconsult,"At pi2 or pi3, re-consult and re-emit the successor state slice atomically at every FSM transition."
  must.singleton-lease,One session holds one active cc-task lease; no pool self-claim and no bulk claim.
  must.reins-never-authority,"Reins is a readout and demand-shape projection; an affordance, projection, or freshness signal never grants execution authority."
  must.inv1-deadlock-freedom,"INV-1: every non-terminal stage has at least one outgoing transition."
  must.inv2-liveness,"INV-2: every claimed task eventually reaches a terminal stage or is explicitly reported stuck."
  must.inv3-escape,"INV-3: every BLOCKED state has an operator escape transition out."
  must.inv4-authority-escapable,"INV-4: escape never depends on the process it governs."
  must.inv5-cognition-writable,"INV-5: a blocked lane can always write its cognition surfaces."
  must.off-limits-surface-principle,Off-limits surfaces narrow authority; a carrier-specific list is delta and absence never broadens scope.
  must.canon-echo-repair,Canon echo absence or mismatch permits one same-level reinjection; a second failure means BLOCKED with canon_echo_failed.
  must.impingement-offer-plane,"An orienting portal is pull-only and non-consumption is conformant; it never grants authority, satisfies a MUST, or weakens a MUST."
  must.lockstep-protected-actions,claim dispatch transition mutation close acceptance require one fresh matching position canon impingement task authority scope claim route receipt chain; absence staleness or mismatch means refuse.
  must.lossless-canon,Canon content permits only byte-preserving or bijective lossless recoding; soft or embedding compression is forbidden.
  must.pi-floor-mask-before-objective,A leaf below the measured pi3 floor is inadmissible and masked before routing objective evaluation.
  must.canon-before-prune,"Build, inject, and verify a passing canon echo per participating leaf before pruning onboard canon prose."
  must.conformance-before-dispatch,No leaf receives dispatched SDLC work before its canon level and retention are measured and conformant.
  must.two-kernel-separation,Canon obligation-plane fidelity and orienting offer-plane decision-regret are separate kernels and neither substitutes for the other.
  must.source-admission-before-derivation,Every derivation fact estimate signal lens constellation or learning receipt must trace to an admitted source; AIR joins every dependency before count sort relation aggregation utility or rendering.
  must.orthogonal-context-coordinates,Scope lifecycle position temporal scale temporal tense semantic resolution environment scope audience and purpose remain independent; surprise is a signal estimate and never a temporal axis.
  must.signal-estimate-offer-separation,A SignalEstimate is evidence-derived state; an OrientingSignal is a no-effect attention offer bound to estimates lens constellation position and optional portal; neither may authorize.
  must.constraint-mask-before-signal-utility,A signal lens applies the exact constraint mask before utility weighting or constellation formation; no score signal or pickup can weaken WHAT MUST authority or admission.
  must.learning-receipt-specificity,A learning update requires exposure candidate set selection policy propensity action outcome effect cost witnesses receipt correction and exactly one named update target.
  must.context-action-lifecycle-admission,Every lifecycle operation or transition shown as an action binds the exact current position and matching lifecycle admission; unavailable evidence or authority cannot render the action legal.
  must.projection-loss-manifest,Every projection carries one content-addressed static field mapping and exhaustive omission manifest plus a deny-oblivious instance loss receipt; hashes prove structure not producer authenticity.
  must.provenance-kind-source-binding,Every fact provenance kind must be admitted by each direct source class or be explicitly derived; constitutional provenance requires constitutional evidence and stipulation or consent requires its typed position receipt.

[7,]{id,content}:
  what.grounding.stage-vocabulary,S0 S1 S2 S3 S3_5 S4 S5 S6 S7 S8 S9 S10 S11 BLOCKED
  what.grounding.disconfirmation-repair,"S3 -> S3_5; S3_5 -> {S4, S0}"
  what.grounding.blocked-repair,"Fall(nonterminal, nonblocked) -> BLOCKED; S6 -> BLOCKED; S7 -> BLOCKED; BLOCKED -> {S6, S0}"
  what.stage.s6.gate,"At S6 (Implementation), produce implementation_evidence with fields mutation_scope_refs,implementation_evidence; report via the existing relay/receipt path."
  what.stage.s6.topology,"S6 next: S7[role=advance, authority=coord.case.advance, guards=implementation_complete,evidence_present, actions=append_stage_transition,begin_runtime_verification, enforcement=declared]; BLOCKED[role=repair, authority=system.gate.refusal, guards=implementation_gate_refused, actions=record_blocker_report,append_stage_transition, enforcement=declared]; fall: BLOCKED[role=repair, authority=system.gate.refusal, guards=gate_refused, actions=record_blocker_report,append_stage_transition, enforcement=declared]; operation admissions: source_mutation[authority=system.mutation.admit, guards=stage_at_least_s6,implementation_authorized,source_mutation_authorized,mutation_in_mutation_scope_refs, actions=admit_scoped_mutation, enforcement=enforced, ref=hooks/scripts/cc-task-gate.impl.sh]."
  what.stage.blocked.gate,"At BLOCKED (Blocked repair state), produce blocker_report with fields blocked_reason,blocked_witness,relay_receipt; report via the existing relay/receipt path."
  what.stage.blocked.topology,"BLOCKED next: S6[role=repair, authority=coord.grant.mint, guards=escape_grant_valid,resume_authorized, actions=record_escape_grant,append_stage_transition,resume_implementation, enforcement=declared]; S0[role=repair, authority=coord.grant.mint, guards=escape_grant_valid,restart_authorized, actions=record_escape_grant,append_stage_transition,restart_intake, enforcement=declared]; fall: none; operation admissions: none."

{"how":"[4,]{id,content}:
  how.command-paths,scripts/hapax-methodology-dispatch scripts/cc-claim scripts/cc-close scripts/cc-stage-advance
  how.scoped-source-mutation,"Claim the exact task, mutate only declared mutation_scope_refs, run declared quality gates, and append evidence without rewriting history."
  how.relay-and-receipt,"Report the current position and evidence through the existing relay and receipt ledger; retain exact task, route, canon, and claim identifiers."
  how.blocked-repair,"Record blocked_reason, blocked_witness, and relay_receipt; resume only through a valid operator escape to S6 or S0."","must":"[37,]{id,content}:
  must.coordinator-engagement,"The single coordinating session MUST dispatch appropriate slices and MAY do support mutations, but must NEVER operate outside the SDLC + capability surface."
  must.raw-prose-gate,"Operator prose, relay notes, dashboards, terminal paste, and session memory are intake, not implementation authority."
  must.scope-mask-before-objective,NEVER unions and ONLY intersects across scope; malformed or missing constraints fail-closed before routing objective evaluation.
  must.authorization-absence,An absent *_authorized flag means not authorized.
  must.binding-vocabulary,cc-task AuthorityCase mutation_scope_refs route_id NEVER ONLY fail-closed governed-override-not-bypass
  must.grounding.authorization-vocabulary,axiom_mutation_authorized decision_minting_authorized docs_mutation_authorized implementation_authorized provider_spend_authorized public_current release_authorized runtime_mutation_authorized source_mutation_authorized vault_mutation_authorized
  must.grounding.gate-verdict-vocabulary,pass refuse BLOCKED
  must.grounding.atomic-position-vocabulary,task_id stage_token legal_successors authority_case authorized_flags mutation_scope_refs claim_identity route_decision canon_hash canon_version canon_level effective_constraint_digest impingement_hash portal_set receipt_lineage
  must.gate-is-authority,"The canon informs and the external gate enforces; injected prose never substitutes for claim, scope, route, mutation, transition, or close admission."
  must.no-silent-downgrade,"Missing, stale, malformed, mismatched, or below-floor context refuses the action with a typed repair path; it never becomes an empty or unconstrained default."
  must.atomic-position-chain,"Task, claim, relay, receipt, FSM position, canon, and impingement hashes must describe one current position before a protected action can proceed."
  must.escape-grant,"EscapeGrant is explicit, receipted, reversible, and cannot suppress the position, canon, or impingement record."
  must.transition-reconsult,"At pi2 or pi3, re-consult and re-emit the successor state slice atomically at every FSM transition."
  must.singleton-lease,One session holds one active cc-task lease; no pool self-claim and no bulk claim.
  must.reins-never-authority,"Reins is a readout and demand-shape projection; an affordance, projection, or freshness signal never grants execution authority."
  must.inv1-deadlock-freedom,"INV-1: every non-terminal stage has at least one outgoing transition."
  must.inv2-liveness,"INV-2: every claimed task eventually reaches a terminal stage or is explicitly reported stuck."
  must.inv3-escape,"INV-3: every BLOCKED state has an operator escape transition out."
  must.inv4-authority-escapable,"INV-4: escape never depends on the process it governs."
  must.inv5-cognition-writable,"INV-5: a blocked lane can always write its cognition surfaces."
  must.off-limits-surface-principle,Off-limits surfaces narrow authority; a carrier-specific list is delta and absence never broadens scope.
  must.canon-echo-repair,Canon echo absence or mismatch permits one same-level reinjection; a second failure means BLOCKED with canon_echo_failed.
  must.impingement-offer-plane,"An orienting portal is pull-only and non-consumption is conformant; it never grants authority, satisfies a MUST, or weakens a MUST."
  must.lockstep-protected-actions,claim dispatch transition mutation close acceptance require one fresh matching position canon impingement task authority scope claim route receipt chain; absence staleness or mismatch means refuse.
  must.lossless-canon,Canon content permits only byte-preserving or bijective lossless recoding; soft or embedding compression is forbidden.
  must.pi-floor-mask-before-objective,A leaf below the measured pi3 floor is inadmissible and masked before routing objective evaluation.
  must.canon-before-prune,"Build, inject, and verify a passing canon echo per participating leaf before pruning onboard canon prose."
  must.conformance-before-dispatch,No leaf receives dispatched SDLC work before its canon level and retention are measured and conformant.
  must.two-kernel-separation,Canon obligation-plane fidelity and orienting offer-plane decision-regret are separate kernels and neither substitutes for the other.
  must.source-admission-before-derivation,Every derivation fact estimate signal lens constellation or learning receipt must trace to an admitted source; AIR joins every dependency before count sort relation aggregation utility or rendering.
  must.orthogonal-context-coordinates,Scope lifecycle position temporal scale temporal tense semantic resolution environment scope audience and purpose remain independent; surprise is a signal estimate and never a temporal axis.
  must.signal-estimate-offer-separation,A SignalEstimate is evidence-derived state; an OrientingSignal is a no-effect attention offer bound to estimates lens constellation position and optional portal; neither may authorize.
  must.constraint-mask-before-signal-utility,A signal lens applies the exact constraint mask before utility weighting or constellation formation; no score signal or pickup can weaken WHAT MUST authority or admission.
  must.learning-receipt-specificity,A learning update requires exposure candidate set selection policy propensity action outcome effect cost witnesses receipt correction and exactly one named update target.
  must.context-action-lifecycle-admission,Every lifecycle operation or transition shown as an action binds the exact current position and matching lifecycle admission; unavailable evidence or authority cannot render the action legal.
  must.projection-loss-manifest,Every projection carries one content-addressed static field mapping and exhaustive omission manifest plus a deny-oblivious instance loss receipt; hashes prove structure not producer authenticity.
  must.provenance-kind-source-binding,Every fact provenance kind must be admitted by each direct source class or be explicitly derived; constitutional provenance requires constitutional evidence and stipulation or consent requires its typed position receipt.","what":"[7,]{id,content}:
  what.grounding.stage-vocabulary,S0 S1 S2 S3 S3_5 S4 S5 S6 S7 S8 S9 S10 S11 BLOCKED
  what.grounding.disconfirmation-repair,"S3 -> S3_5; S3_5 -> {S4, S0}"
  what.grounding.blocked-repair,"Fall(nonterminal, nonblocked) -> BLOCKED; S6 -> BLOCKED; S7 -> BLOCKED; BLOCKED -> {S6, S0}"
  what.stage.s6.gate,"At S6 (Implementation), produce implementation_evidence with fields mutation_scope_refs,implementation_evidence; report via the existing relay/receipt path."
  what.stage.s6.topology,"S6 next: S7[role=advance, authority=coord.case.advance, guards=implementation_complete,evidence_present, actions=append_stage_transition,begin_runtime_verification, enforcement=declared]; BLOCKED[role=repair, authority=system.gate.refusal, guards=implementation_gate_refused, actions=record_blocker_report,append_stage_transition, enforcement=declared]; fall: BLOCKED[role=repair, authority=system.gate.refusal, guards=gate_refused, actions=record_blocker_report,append_stage_transition, enforcement=declared]; operation admissions: source_mutation[authority=system.mutation.admit, guards=stage_at_least_s6,implementation_authorized,source_mutation_authorized,mutation_in_mutation_scope_refs, actions=admit_scoped_mutation, enforcement=enforced, ref=hooks/scripts/cc-task-gate.impl.sh]."
  what.stage.blocked.gate,"At BLOCKED (Blocked repair state), produce blocker_report with fields blocked_reason,blocked_witness,relay_receipt; report via the existing relay/receipt path."
  what.stage.blocked.topology,"BLOCKED next: S6[role=repair, authority=coord.grant.mint, guards=escape_grant_valid,resume_authorized, actions=record_escape_grant,append_stage_transition,resume_implementation, enforcement=declared]; S0[role=repair, authority=coord.grant.mint, guards=escape_grant_valid,restart_authorized, actions=record_escape_grant,append_stage_transition,restart_intake, enforcement=declared]; fall: none; operation admissions: none.""}
